Vulnerabilities.Name: Authentication Bypass
Vulnerabilities.Title: Hikvision IP Camera Authentication Bypass
Vulnerabilities.Description: Certain Hikvision IP cameras allow bypass of authentication via a backdoor, enabling unauthorized access to the device.
Vulnerabilities.Remediation: Update firmware to the latest version provided by Hikvision that addresses this vulnerability.

Vulnerabilities.Name: Command Injection
Vulnerabilities.Title: Hikvision Command Injection Vulnerability
Vulnerabilities.Description: A command injection vulnerability in the web server of some Hikvision product that allows an attacker to gain unauthorized access.
Vulnerabilities.Remediation: Update device firmware to the latest version that patches this vulnerability.

Vulnerabilities.Name: Directory Traversal
Vulnerabilities.Title: MikroTik RouterOS Directory Traversal Vulnerability
Vulnerabilities.Description: MikroTik RouterOS suffers from a directory traversal vulnerability that could allow an attacker to access sensitive files.
Vulnerabilities.Remediation: Update to RouterOS version 6.46 or later.

Vulnerabilities.Name: Unauthorized Access
Vulnerabilities.Title: MikroTik RouterOS Winbox Authentication Bypass
Vulnerabilities.Description: MikroTik RouterOS through 6.42 allows unauthenticated remote attackers to read arbitrary files and remote authenticated attackers to write arbitrary files via a directory traversal vulnerability in the WinBox interface.
Vulnerabilities.Remediation: Update to RouterOS version 6.43 or later which contains fixes for this vulnerability.

Vulnerabilities.Name: MQTT Transport Information Disclosure
Vulnerabilities.Title: Amazon Echo Information Disclosure Vulnerability
Vulnerabilities.Description: The MQTT transport in certain Amazon Echo devices may leak sensitive information during the pairing process.
Vulnerabilities.Remediation: Ensure device is updated to the latest firmware version provided by Amazon.

Vulnerabilities.Name: Bluetooth Profile Security
Vulnerabilities.Title: Amazon Echo Unprotected Bluetooth Interface
Vulnerabilities.Description: The device allows any Bluetooth connection without requiring authentication, allowing nearby attackers to connect and potentially stream audio.
Vulnerabilities.Remediation: Enable voice PIN or disable Bluetooth when not in use.

Vulnerabilities.Name: Authorization Bypass
Vulnerabilities.Title: SmartThings Hub Authorization Bypass
Vulnerabilities.Description: Samsung SmartThings Hub has an authorization bypass vulnerability that could allow attackers to execute unauthorized MQTT commands.
Vulnerabilities.Remediation: Update to the latest hub firmware via the SmartThings app.

Vulnerabilities.Name: Command Injection
Vulnerabilities.Title: SmartThings Hub Command Injection
Vulnerabilities.Description: Samsung SmartThings Hub is vulnerable to a command injection that could allow remote code execution with root privileges.
Vulnerabilities.Remediation: Immediately update to firmware version 0.0.36.0 or later.
